use_cases: Display system health or connection status in SaaS dashboards
Show active/inactive states in developer tool interfaces
Indicate service availability in monitoring applications
Display user online/offline status in real-time apps
Show processing states in gaming HUD interfaces
ai_summary: A compact status indicator badge with HUD-style glass-morphism design featuring gradient fills, glowing stroke effects, and theme-aware coloring. Supports multiple variants (primary, secondary, danger, warning) with custom color overrides. Uses Framer Motion for subtle animations and integrates with Next.js theme system for seamless dark/light mode switching.
